components: H1 headline + subheadline + dual CTA (primary/ghost) + hero image or demo video
conversion_role: First impression + primary conversion entry; reduce bounce rate

components: Row of client/partner logos with subtle grayscale filter; "Trusted by N+ companies"
conversion_role: Trust establishment; reduces skepticism immediately after hero

components: 3-column grid with icon + short title + 1-2 sentence description; no screenshots
conversion_role: Communicate value props quickly; scannable above the fold

components: Alternating left/right layout: screenshot/video + benefit copy; each row one feature
conversion_role: Educate on specific capabilities; reduce support tickets

components: Asymmetric bento grid with feature tiles of varied sizes; icons + short labels + optional demo gif
vibe_fit: modern saas; ai product; design tool

components: Quote cards with avatar + name + role + company; star rating optional; 3-4 visible with carousel
conversion_role: Overcome objections; peer validation; authority building

components: 3-column (Starter/Pro/Enterprise); highlighted middle tier; feature checklist; annual/monthly toggle
conversion_role: Primary revenue conversion point; anchoring with middle tier

components: Accordion with 6-10 common questions; schema markup for SEO; search input optional
conversion_role: Reduce support load; address last-mile objections before purchase

components: Full-width section with headline + single primary CTA + optional email input; contrasting background
conversion_role: Last conversion attempt; captures scrollers who didn't convert above

components: 3-5 bold metrics (users; revenue; uptime; NPS) with labels; animated count-up optional
Centered video with play button overlay; auto-pause; captions required; thumbnail must be compelling
conversion_role: Dramatically increases time-on-page; show not tell

components: Feature matrix vs 2-3 named competitors; honest gaps shown in small print; CTA after table
vibe_fit: competitive market; switching product; challenger brand
conversion_role: Converts comparison shoppers; SEO value for "[product] vs [competitor]" queries

components: Embedded sandbox or click-through prototype; no signup required; guided tooltip sequence
vibe_fit: developer tools; complex saas; ai product
conversion_role: Highest-intent conversion action; removes fear of commitment

components: Tab bar with 3-4 personas/roles; each tab shows tailored copy + screenshot
conversion_role: Personalized relevance; reduces pogo-sticking for non-primary persona

components: Logo grid of compatible tools/APIs with count badge; "Connects with N+ tools"
conversion_role: Reduces integration risk objection; captures existing-toolchain buyers

components: Minimal email field + CTA; value prop copy (e.g. "Weekly tips for..."); privacy reassurance
conversion_role: Builds owned audience; lower commitment than full signup

components: Transparent to frosted header on scroll; logo + nav links + primary CTA button always visible
conversion_role: Persistent conversion entry point; recovers scrollers who missed hero CTA
